case_title: LAMA, GEORGE VS PRICE, TERRY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-11-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-06-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 6/6/06 AT 10:00 A.M. PLAINTIFF TO AMEND COMPLAINT. DISMISS DEFENDANT TERRY PRICE WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
PLAINTIFF AMENDED THE COMPLAINT BY CHANGING THE AMOUNT OF THE CLAIM, DISMISS TERRY PRICE AS DEFENDANT & HAVE CAREY LIMOUSINE AS NEW DEFT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, TERRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, TERRY CAREY LIMOUSINE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,618.87 FILED BY LAMA, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, TERRY CAREY LIMOUSINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT PRICE, TERRY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAMA, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAREY LIMOUSINE $2,613.37 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,663.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
